generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how underfunded preparedness programs leave communities vulnerable. The 2023 Texas blackouts showed what happens when we cut corners on resilience. We can't afford to wait for another crisis - basic preparedness isn't about fear, it's about responsible citizenship. #NationalSecurity #CommunityResilience
